title: Nasdaq 100 price swings leaves analysts on Wall Street worried
description: Such sharp moves have only taken place on four previous instances since the turn of the millennium - the Covid shock of 2020, the bear market of 2022, the global financial crisis of 2008, and the bust of the dotcom bubble in 2000. Some cautious analysts are drawing a similar parallel to the ongoing Artificial Intelligence boom.
content:
A similar trend was observed by BTIG Chief Market Technician Jonathan Krinsky, who observed the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index (SOX) had seen at least 15 up or down moves of at least 3% in the last 30 days, a streak last seen in 2000.

title: AI adoption accelerates, but maturity lags
description: Thailand's artificial intelligence (AI) adoption is growing rapidly, with 43% of surveyed organisations now using AI continuously, up from 32% last year.
content:
Thailand's artificial intelligence (AI) adoption is growing rapidly, with 43% of surveyed organisations now using AI continuously, up from 32% last year.

title: Director George Lucas says AI is the future for movies
description: Star Wars creator George Lucas believes artificial intelligence makes the movie-making process "much easier", but he isn't a fan of Hollywood focus groups.
content:
George Lucas believes artificial intelligence is the future of movie making - because it makes the process "much easier".

title: Cadence rolls out AI agent to speed circuit board, chip packaging design
description: Cadence Design Systems on Wednesday launched an artificial-intelligence "super agent" that designs printed circuit boards and chip packages, extending ​the company's push to automate more of the engineering process.

title: India, EU strengthen strategic partnership at 3rd TTC; announce cooperation in AI, semiconductors, clean technologies
description: The European Union and India on Wednesday reaffirmed their commitment to strengthen strategic cooperation in trade, technology and security at the third meeting of the India-EU Trade and Technology Council (TTC), with both sides agreeing to deepen collaboration in artificial intelligence, semiconductors, quantum technologies, clean energy and resilient supply chains.
content: Brussels [Belgium], July 16 (ANI): India and the European Union on Wednesday reaffirmed their commitment to strengthen strategic cooperation in trade, technology and security at the third meeting of the India-EU Trade and Technology Council (TTC), wi... [4584 chars]

title: EU Trade and Technology Council advances cooperation across 3 key working groups on tech, clean energy, trade
description: The third meeting of the India-European Union Trade and Technology Council (TTC) on Wednesday advanced cooperation across three key working groups covering strategic technologies and digital connectivity, clean and green technologies, and trade, investment and resilient value chains, with both sides announcing a series of initiatives in artificial intelligence, semiconductors, green technologies, startups and supply chain resilience.

title: Quebec and Alberta plan to work together to integrate AI in government
